title: <div><tt>7. Oceanic Dream-Archive (the Nexus exists only in the collective uncon
content:
7. Oceanic Dream-Archive (the Nexus exists only in the collective unconscious of sleeping whales)
8. Crystalline Salt-Desert Palimpsest (every grain of sand is a overwritten text in a dead language)
9. Post-Human Child Cult (the Nexus is maintained by immortal children who speak only in questions)
10. Necrocratic Bureaucracy (the Nexus is governed by the dead authors themselves, now undead civil servants)

Mandatory Structure (follow exactly, no deviations):
1. One-sentence logline that instantly conveys the world's core strangeness.
2. The Nexus in this world — what it physically/metaphysically IS, how mortals interact with it, and its price.
3. Cosmology & Metaphysics — how the Nexus warps reality, time, causality, identity, or death.
4. Dominant Societies (at least three conflicting cultures or factions, with their languages, taboos, and relationship to the Nexus).
5. Everyday Life — what a normal person worries about, eats, loves, fears.
6. Magic / Technology System — how the Nexus is "used" (if it can be used at all).
context: From document: You are a visionary designer tasked with creating the ultimate synthesis… — chunk 5 (chunk 5/18)
